# AEReturnID

**Type Alias**

Specifies a return ID for a created Apple event.

## Declaration

```swift
typealias AEReturnID = Int16
```

## Discussion

When you call the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/coreservices/1448525-aecreateappleevent] function, you pass a value of type `AEReturnID` for the `returnID` parameter. [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/coreservices/apple_events/1542799-id_constants_for_the_aecreateapp] lists the valid constant values for a variable or parameter of this type.
title: AEReturnID
